patch.value:
Decompose the `src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts` monolith (2631 lines, the lowest-rated
CodeFactor file at grade B) into focused sibling modules under
`src/sdk/cli-contracts/`, continuing the established barrel-split pattern
(`commander-types`, `commander-mutation-options`, `enum-contracts`,
`tool-option-contracts`, `tool-parameter-tables`).

## What moved

- `cli-contracts/string-lists.ts` (new leaf util) — `normalizeUniqueStringList`,
  the unique/non-empty string-list helper shared by flag-alias dedup and MCP
  schema key dedup (single source of truth).
- `cli-contracts/flag-contracts.ts` — the `CliFlagContract`/`ToolOptionFlagContract`
  interfaces, alias-metadata helpers, all ~70 `*_FLAG_CONTRACTS` arrays,
  `resolveSubcommandFlagContractsForCommand`, and `toCompletionFlagString`.
- `cli-contracts/tool-schema.ts` — `PmActionSchemaContract`, the per-action
  parameter key sets, `PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCHEMA_CONTRACTS`, the strict + provider
  schema builders, the schema version constants, and `_testOnlyCliContracts`.
- `cli-contracts.ts` is now a thin re-export barrel (2631 -> 170 lines) so every
  existing import site keeps importing from `./cli-contracts.js` unchanged.

## Constraints honored

- Zero behavior change: `pm contracts --full` snapshot (`tests/fixtures/contracts/full.json`)
  is byte-identical; tool schema stays `4.0.4`.
- Public SDK export surface unchanged (`toUniqueFlagContracts` stays internal,
  re-imported by tool-schema only for the `_testOnlyCliContracts` test bundle).
- 100/100/100/100 coverage preserved (5139 tests); ESLint + jscpd + static
  quality gate green; tsc clean. No import cycle (the type-only barrel import in
  `tool-option-contracts.ts` now points at the `flag-contracts.ts` sibling).
- Upgraded 7 auto-generated boilerplate docstrings to behavior-describing prose
  while relocating them.

Advances epic pm-92if (CodeFactor A -> A+): removes the worst-rated source file
from the hotspot list and shrinks the per-file complexity surface CodeFactor grades.
Decompose cli-contracts.ts monolith into flag-contracts + tool-schema sibling modules

author: claude-code-agent
message: Link cli-contracts decomposition to authoritative-surface ADR + barrel-split decision

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Splitting the cli-contracts barrel requires re-pointing the ToolOptionFlagContract type import in tool-option-contracts.ts from ../cli-contracts.js to the ./flag-contracts.js sibling — importing the type from the barrel while the barrel re-exports tool-option-contracts is a cycle. Keep toUniqueFlagContracts exported from flag-contracts (needed by tool-schema's _testOnlyCliContracts bundle) but OUT of the barrel re-export list so the public SDK surface is unchanged. The _testOnlyCliContracts object literal needs no docstring (gate only requires them on exported functions/interfaces/types, not object/array/call consts).

value.author: claude-code-agent

Keep toUniqueFlagContracts exported from flag-contracts (tool-schema's _testOnlyCliContracts needs it) but OUT of the barrel re-export list so the public SDK surface stays unchanged. _testOnlyCliContracts (object literal) needs no docstring — the gate only requires them on exported functions/interfaces/types.
